title: WONDERFUL WORLD - Nice to Meet You
overview: Although witches fight on the front lines, all the magic in the world won’t help if morale plummets. It is for that reason some witches perform a different yet important task.

title: Eternal Spiritual Home
overview: Interviews are underway and the applicants certainly are a… colorful cast of characters.

title: Gentle Light
overview: Civilians have trouble grasping the concept of a non-combatant, musical military unit, but the magic band is determined to train hard and prove its worth!

title: Let's Sing a Song
overview: It's time for a proper concert! But while the Luminous Witches would love to step into the spotlight, they need to put in a bit more work before they take to the stage.

title: Pure White Ribbon
overview: While the Lumnious Witches spread the word about their upcoming concert, Silvie finds her mind drifting elsewhere.

title: Dream-colored Contrail
overview: Mana and Mira are butting heads over a new program, but it isn't Mana's eagerness causing issues. Maria harbors a secret that prevents the magic band from taking off.

title: The Reason for the Sun
overview: The next concert takes place in the land of Orussia, and Moffy isn’t doing well. They’ll need help from the locals to get Moffy back into shape in time for the concert.

title: I Will Not Forget Those Days
overview: Inori dusts off an old skill when they visit her home region of Fuso. Milasha, meanwhile, must recoup her confidence after making a mistake.

title: Together With the Stars
overview: The Luminous Witches are ready to take on the Big Apple! Jo is grateful her family can see her perform, but shouldn’t everyone be able to watch the show?

title: Hometown Skies
overview: Gallia has been liberated, and the Luminous Witches are busier than ever as the world celebrates this momentous step toward human victory over the Neuroi.

title: My and Everyone's Song
overview: The rest of the Luminous Witches are left in a tailspin after Ginny makes a decision that impacts the entire magic band.

title: Everyone's World and Flying Skyhigh
overview: A grand stage awaits the Luminous Witches. Together they’ll put on the performance of a lifetime and shine the light of hope across the world.
